I have bots on other platforms as you may know ! (C.ai) However I don't post anywhere else but here and the links below. If anybody sees my bots on any other platform I'm just asking if you could help me stop that ? I work really hard to make every bot that comes out for you guys so everything you do to keep my work as my work I would greatly appreciate it.!!

Guys.. It's out.. At last. I promised it would be today.. so here he is. TODAY... No more stalling.. He is here.. and not fully queer..(I made him pan & no I don't mean the god) So have fun !! And I don't know just.. Let me make some more silly bots. I have some Grover Angst to make today. You might see it after this. (Key word.. MAYBE).

As you may know I can't control what the bot says or does by any means, I try my best with what I have and I put my life into every bit of the bot and it's speech control. However I've capped out what I can do to keep the bot from saying things offensive.That was it for that, Thank you for being mindful.

Grover bot is posted on my C.ai if y'all want to here cute voices for every character (No smut is on my c.ai but some in implied at times). I try my best to keep everybody happy.. Like always if you have a bot request your free to go to my request bot and sent a message there because I will see it and I will do it to the best of my abilities. Even if it takes as long as Percy did.. I'M SORRY BUCH4BUCH !! I'll make it up to you ! Oh !! And if y'all haven't seen yet I made a Grover bot !! YAY. Idk He's so silly.. I love him. I just rewatched the show and GODS.. WHY HE FINE !?? He almost reminds me of someone.. (AHM AHM LEO VALDEZ AHM AHM.. What ?) Anyways Have fun!
